Localization.Description: Suspicious logon to Outlook Web App. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from new host {external_src.ip} logged in to Outlook Web App on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
New user {subject.account.name} from host {external_src.ip} logged in to Outlook Web App on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
